## EXAMPLES

This folder contains a sage script demonstrating examples of advanced use of the Tate pairing, as described in my note (ePrint 2025/477),
where possible both on elliptic curves (using what is already in Sage) as well as on dimension-2 Jacobians using the code provided in this repository.

**WARNING:** At the moment, all of the code in this repository is generated by Claude Code by giving it the pdf of the paper, and the code in this repository.
It did an okay job generating most code, but there are still major (!) flaws in each (!) example, both mathematical and in code.
I will go through each example in due time to make these correct and nice. 

## FIXED EXAMPLES
So far: 
 - Example 1: Husemoller's theorem: divisibility is implied by squares
 - Example 2: The profile determines the coset: we know above which point we are!
 - Example 3: The 'magic' of Entangled Basis Generation and its generalizations.
